message:
test(store): add golden and metamorphic tests for key encoding and glob matching

Add 16 golden tests freezing exact key encoding format:
- DB 0 passthrough (no prefix)
- DB 1/15 namespace prefix format (\0frdb\0 + BE u64 + key)
- DB namespace prefix constant
- Encode/decode roundtrip for all DBs
- Decode rejection of unprefixed and short keys
- Glob pattern matching: exact, *, ?, prefix*, *suffix
- Glob brackets: [ae], [0-9], [^ae]
- Glob escape sequences

Add 8 proptest metamorphic relations:
- Encode/decode roundtrip invariant
- DB 0 identity transform
- Star matches all strings
- Empty pattern matches only empty
- Pattern self-match (reflexive)
- prefix* matches prefix+anything
- *suffix matches anything+suffix
- ? matches exactly one character

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,3 +7,6 @@ edition = "2024"
 fr-expire = { version = "0.1.0", path = "../fr-expire" }
 fr-persist = { version = "0.1.0", path = "../fr-persist" }
 libc = "0.2.184"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+proptest = "1"
